items.title: Curling help, just the way you need it
items.summary: As our sport grows, you need every competitive advantage you can get. Our goal is to offer solutions to improve your game, as…
items.content_html:
As our sport grows, you need every competitive advantage you can get. Our goal is to offer solutions to improve your game, as a grassroots recreational curler. We're also working on solutions to help curling clubs with their recreational leagues and issues like pace of play.

Check back later as we add details.
